name: anti-generic-ui-audit
safety_limits: warning before blocking unless the evidence indicates a clear risk
do not rely on a single fragile textual match as final proof
forbidden_actions: pretend a screenshot-based runtime check happened when it did not
human_approval_triggers: the task shifts from review to implementation
the task requests external tooling or browser automation not available in Atlas
the task asks to overwrite design assets
rollback_manual: no rollback needed because the skill is read-only
validations: output includes status, warnings, evidence and next action
findings are tied to concrete project files or signals
anti-generic claims are backed by evidence
responsive and contrast checks are reported explicitly
